permissions.pageDesc: Manage dashboard permission keys used by roles and authorization policies.
permissions.emptyDesc: Create permissions that can be assigned to dashboard roles.
permissions.desc: Use a stable Module.Action name so policies and roles can reference it safely.
permissions.systemProtected: System permission names are protected because they are referenced by authorization policies.
permissions.deleteMessage: This permission will be removed if it is not a protected system permission or assigned to roles.
